Log:

  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove Author line

 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN

-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org

 COMMENT=	Calculate offset polygons
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1

+

 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
